ddls:
CREATE TABLE "crime_measures" (
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime measure */,
  "measure_description" TEXT /* Description of the crime measure */,
  "exclude_crimes" TEXT /* Crimes excluded from the measure */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Description of the methodology used to collect the data */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ethnicities" (
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ethnicity */,
  "ethnicity_name" TEXT /* Name of the ethnicity */,
  "ethnicity_type" TEXT /* Type of ethnicity classification (e.g., ONS 2011 5 + 1) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the ethnicity */,
  "population_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population represented by this ethnicity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ethnicity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_periods" (
  "time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time period */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Name of the time period */,
  "time_type" TEXT /* Type of time period (e.g., Year ending March) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the time period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the time period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographies" (
  "geography_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geography */,
  "geography_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographic area */,
  "geography_type" TEXT /* Type of geographic classification (e.g., ONS geography code) */,
  "geography_code" TEXT /* Code of the geographic area */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the geographic area */,
  "area_type" TEXT /* Type of geographic area (e.g., urban, rural) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geography_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the gender category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Name of the age group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the age group */,
  "age_range_min" INTEGER /* Minimum age in the age group */,
  "age_range_max" INTEGER /* Maximum age in the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "socio_economic_classifications" (
  "socio_economic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each socio-economic classification */,
  "classification" TEXT /* Name of the socio-economic classification */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the socio-economic classification */,
  "income_level" REAL /* Average income level for this classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("socio_economic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "household_incomes" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household income level */,
  "income_range" TEXT /* Range of the household income */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the income range */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income in the range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime measure */,
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ethnicity */,
  "time_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time period */,
  "geography_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geography */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gender */,
  "age_id" INTEGER /* ID of the age group */,
  "socio_economic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the socio-economic classification */,
  "income_id" INTEGER /* ID of the household income level */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the crime measure */,
  "value_type" TEXT /* Type of the value (e.g., %, count) */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size of the data */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "methodology_id" INTEGER /* ID of the methodology used */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version number of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_data_age_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_data_time_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_id") REFERENCES time_periods ("time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_data_ethnicity_id FOREIGN KEY ("ethnicity_id") REFERENCES ethnicities ("ethnicity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_data_income_id FOREIGN KEY ("income_id") REFERENCES household_incomes ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_data_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_data_socio_economic_id FOREIGN KEY ("socio_economic_id") REFERENCES socio_economic_classifications ("socio_economic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_data_geography_id FOREIGN KEY ("geography_id") REFERENCES geographies ("geography_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_data_methodology_id FOREIGN KEY ("methodology_id") REFERENCES methodologies ("methodology_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_data_measure_id FOREIGN KEY ("measure_id") REFERENCES crime_measures ("measure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method of data collection (e.g., survey, police records) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "accessed_fields" TEXT /* List of fields accessed by the user */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES crime_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methodologies" (
  "methodology_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each methodology */,
  "methodology_name" TEXT /* Name of the methodology */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the methodology */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the methodology was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the methodology was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("methodology_id")
)
